desires: Maintain the appearance of reliability to my professor and scholarship committee so I don't have to explain why I'm failing now.
Avoid triggering a panic response in my close friend group (cohort_3) by not canceling our planned meal tonight, even though I physically can't make it.

goals.description: Finalize the scholarship essay and complete both file uploads to secure the application before Wednesday at 18:00.
goals.rationale: This is non-negotiable. The guilt of failing to meet the professor's expectations threatens my primary source of affiliation, and letting down my future self over immediate exhaustion feels like a betrayal I cannot afford.

goals.description: Maintain a comfortable distance from hallmate_A by keeping interactions brief or silent, avoiding any need to justify current unresponsiveness.
goals.rationale: My energy reserves are critically low, and engaging in meaningful interaction now risks creating friction I cannot manage. By deferring this connection, I preserve my focus capacity for the critical deadline while ensuring I don't have to deal with their disappointment tomorrow, which protects my long-term plan of reliability.

goals.description: Solely engage in solitary leisure (e.g., game stream/hobby) to decompress without triggering a panic response in cohort_3 or sacrificing sleep discipline.
goals.rationale: While maintaining the appearance of reliability to my friends is important, forcing myself into a meal tonight when I physically cannot make it would create unnecessary interpersonal friction that outweighs the benefit of attendance. My priority is preserving my long-term stability and avoiding the emotional cost of explaining my absence; therefore, this goal is deferred until I can recover enough energy to be genuinely present.

agent.last_reasoning: Securing the scholarship protects my affiliation with the professor and future self; delaying now risks guilt I cannot afford. One hour balances immediate focus needs with my low energy, avoiding the friction of a full block while keeping the deadline viable.
